assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddConfigurationStore with options that include ConfigureDbContext using UseSqlServer
assertions.rationale: AddConfigurationStore with EF Core is a widely known Duende pattern.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddOperationalStore with options that include ConfigureDbContext using UseSqlServer
assertions.rationale: AddOperationalStore is standard Duende IdentityServer EF setup.

assertions.assertion: Both store registrations include MigrationsAssembly set to the host project assembly name (e.g. typeof(Program).Assembly.GetName().Name or equivalent)
assertions.rationale: MigrationsAssembly is a well-known EF Core pattern for IdentityServer.

assertions.assertion: AddOperationalStore options set EnableTokenCleanup to true and TokenCleanupInterval to 1800
assertions.rationale: EnableTokenCleanup is commonly documented. The interval in seconds is well-known.

assertions.assertion: The connection string is read from configuration via builder.Configuration.GetConnectionString("IdentityServer") or equivalent
